reason: Successfully tested agent messaging functionality - sent a math question and received correct response
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing available agents
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260717-163121-21ne" agent in the sidebar - Agent page loaded successfully, session was created
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status confirmed as "idle" (shown in top right of agent page)
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully entered and sent using the Send message button
Step 5: Waited for response and verified it mentions "4" - Agent responded immediately with "4" (shown in chat message list with "Worked for 1s" timing indicator)
Step 6: Took screenshot confirming the response - Screenshot captured showing the complete chat exchange with agent response "4" visible
